div.div:
DISCONNECTED: fillColor=#F1F5F9 / strokeColor=#333333 / fontColor=#333333 / icon: Bluetooth Off
CONNECTING: fillColor=#EBF3FE / strokeColor=#333333 / fontColor=#333333 / icon: Bluetooth + Spinner (pulse animation)
CONNECTED: fillColor=#ECFDF5 / strokeColor=#333333 / fontColor=#333333 / icon: Bluetooth + CheckCircle
RECEIVING: fillColor=#F0F9FF / strokeColor=#333333 / fontColor=#333333 / icon: Activity (点滅アニメーション)
ERROR: fillColor=#FEF2F2 / strokeColor=#333333 / fontColor=#333333 / icon: AlertCircle (赤 accent)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 769px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #475569;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#475569, #9ba7b8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: * アイコンは Lucide React Native ライブラリ使用。点滅・pulse アニメーションは Reanimated で実装。全バッジは strokeColor=#333333 で統一。

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
